verdict_reasoning: ITPR1 is a canonical ER-integral IP₃-receptor calcium-release channel. Its functional domain spans the ER bilayer to sense cytoplasmic IP₃ and release ER-luminal Ca²⁺. No cell-surface-directed therapeutic programs target it on the cell surface; no evidence of PM cycling, lysosomal exocytosis, cancer ecto-display, cell-death surface exposure, activation-induced translocation, or stable TM-partner tethering to PM. Mature protein is exclusively ER-resident.
